privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for suite_crm_env define_opportunity_buying_center task by verifying that the data is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh SQL injections. Confirmed the target opportunity name 'Apex Q4 Supply Chain Automation' and the expected roles (Eleanor Vance as Executive Sponsor, Marcus Thorne as Primary Decision Maker, David Chen as Technical Evaluator) explicitly match the task description and verifier logic.
